name: ERC-20 token
summary: Any ERC-20 — transfers, holders and supply. Generated straight from the contract address; no repo to clone.
note: Generic decode — works for any token today. The example above is USDC.

name: ERC-721 / ERC-1155 NFT
summary: Any NFT collection — ownership and full transfer history, resolved from the collection address.
note: Generic decode — works for any collection today. The example above is BAYC.

name: Graph Network (Horizon)
summary: The Graph's own protocol state — staking provisions, allocations, delegation, curation and rewards. The data every indexer pays GRT to read today.
events: ProvisionCreated, AllocationCreated, AllocationClosed, TokensDelegated, Signalled, HorizonRewardsAssigned
note: horizon-nest is live on Arbitrum; consolidating into a published graph-network-nest (RFC-0011).

name: Epoch Block Oracle
summary: The per-epoch canonical block for every indexed chain — the reference all indexers use to close multichain allocations consistently.
events: DataEdge calldata payloads (EventfulDataEdge emits on Arbitrum)
note: Needs the calldata decoder (the node-independent RFC-0014 slice).

name: QoS / Rewards-Eligibility Oracle
summary: Indexer quality-of-service and reward eligibility — off-chain gateway telemetry posted on-chain.
note: On-chain shape still consolidating post-Horizon — a watch-and-follow target.

name: Uniswap V3
summary: Concentrated-liquidity DEX — pools, swaps, positions, TVL and fees. The showcase for factory discovery: one nest tracks every pool.
events: PoolCreated, Swap, Mint, Burn, Collect, Flash

name: Aave V3
summary: The lending flagship — supplies, borrows, repayments, liquidations and rates across 20+ chains.

name: ENS
summary: The archetypal name-service index — registrations, expiries, resolvers and records across the registry and registrar.

name: Uniswap V2 + Sushiswap
summary: Constant-product AMM — the simpler Uniswap, and the template Sushiswap reuses. One nest, two protocols.

name: Compound V2 + V3
summary: cToken and Comet money-markets — supply, borrow, repayment and liquidation.

name: Lido
summary: The liquid-staking leader — stETH/wstETH deposits, withdrawals, rebases and oracle reporting.

name: Seaport (OpenSea)
summary: The protocol behind the largest NFT marketplace — order fulfilment and cancellation.

name: Curve
summary: StableSwap AMM — pools, exchanges and liquidity with invariant pricing.

name: EigenLayer
summary: Restaking — operator registration, staker delegation, deposits and withdrawals.

name: GMX
summary: Perpetuals — position lifecycle, PnL and liquidations.

name: MakerDAO / Sky
summary: The DAI/USDS CDP engine — vaults, collateral and liquidations.
